items.subject: The next phase of OpenAI’s Education for Countries
items.body: OpenAI advances Education for Countries, expanding AI adoption in schools with new partnerships, teacher training, and tools to improve global learning outcomes.

items.subject: Introducing OpenAI for Singapore
items.body: OpenAI for Singapore launches a multi-year AI partnership to expand deployment, build local talent, and support businesses and public services with AI.

items.subject: Advancing content provenance for a safer, more transparent AI ecosystem
items.body: OpenAI advances AI content provenance with Content Credentials, SynthID, and a verification tool to help people identify and trust AI-generated media.

items.body: OpenAI and Dell partner to bring Codex to hybrid and on-premise environments, helping enterprises deploy AI coding agents securely across data and workflows.

items.subject: Sea's View on the Future of Agentic Software Development with Codex
items.body: Sea Limited's CPO explains why the company is deploying Codex across engineering teams to accelerate AI-native software development in Asia.

items.subject: Work with Codex from anywhere
items.body: Use Codex anywhere with the ChatGPT mobile app. Monitor, steer, and approve coding tasks in real time across devices and remote environments.

summary:
**Summary of Key Developments:**

• **OpenAI Expands Education Efforts**: OpenAI has launched the next phase of its Education for Countries initiative, expanding AI adoption in schools through new partnerships, teacher training, and tools to improve global learning outcomes.
• **OpenAI and Dell Partner on Codex**: OpenAI and Dell have partnered to bring Codex, a coding agent, to hybrid and on-premise enterprise environments, enabling secure deployment of AI across data and workflows.
• **NVIDIA Advances AI Inference**: NVIDIA has announced the arrival of its first CPU, Vera, built specifically for agents, which is expected to reduce AI inference costs by 90%.
• **OpenAI Enhances Content Provenance**: OpenAI has introduced Content Credentials, SynthID, and a verification tool to help identify and trust AI-generated media, advancing content provenance for a safer AI ecosystem.
• **NVIDIA and Google Cloud Empower AI Builders**: NVIDIA and Google Cloud are accelerating AI adoption through their partnership, empowering the next wave of AI builders with cutting-edge technologies.

**Trend:** The development of more advanced AI tools and technologies, such as Codex and Vera, is accelerating the adoption of AI in various industries, including education, enterprise, and research. This trend is expected to continue, driving innovation and transformation across the globe.
